name: Abner Longley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Abner Longley Park in Lebanon, IN! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Heritage Trail Park
description: Come play pickleball at Heritage Trail Park in Zionsville, IN! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Lions Park - Zionsville
description: Lions Park - Zionsville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Zionsville, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Main Street Park - Whitestown
description: Main Street Park - Whitestown is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Whitestown, IN. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Memorial Park - Lebanon
description: Come play pickleball at Memorial Park - Lebanon in Lebanon, IN! There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Mulberry Fields Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mulberry Fields Park in Zionsville, IN! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Pearson Automotive Tennis Center
description: Pearson Automotive Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Zionsville, IN. There are 8 indoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Royal Run Village Club
description: Royal Run Village Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Zionsville, IN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: The Farmers Bank Fieldhouse
description: The Farmers Bank Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lebanon, IN. There are 12 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, and lights.

name: Witham Family YMCA
description: Witham Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Lebanon, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Zionsville Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Zionsville Middle School in Zionsville, IN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Zionsville West Middle School - Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Zionsville West Middle School - Tennis Courts in Whitestown, IN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
